calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Prove Up Hearing And Case Summary
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Shawna Van Tree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Natalia A. Minassian, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Jonathan Neil & Associates Inc.,a California Corporation,

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Mario Constantine Flaviani, individually and dba Marz Mechanical Company,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Witness: Traci Gordon Sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $77,862.98
Pre-Judgment Interest: $4,437.12
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $515.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $85,640.10

Other: Plaintiff is entitled to the immediate possession of the security described in attachment "A" (see scanned judgment)and net proceeds received from the sale of such security will be credited against the judgment amount.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2013 Continued To Sep-04-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
